heading: Modify a Support Plan
body:
The following table describes the ways you can modify your support plan
and its impact on billing:| Action                           | Result                                                                                                                              |
| -------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Upgrade or Downgrade             | Your billing changes occur on the first day of the next month.                                                                      |
| Cancel during a trial period     | Your billing stops immediately.                                                                                                     |
| Cancel outside of a trial period | Atlas schedules for the cancellation of your plan at the end of the month and your billing continues until the cancellation period. |**Basic:**Basic Support Plan- In Atlas, go to the Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
    from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View plan.

  The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
  displays.> **Note:** You always have access to the free Basic support plan.**Dev-premium:**Paid Support Plans* In Atlas, go to the Support page.

  - If it's not already displayed, select your desired organization
    from the Organizations menu in the navigation bar.

  - Click the Support icon in the navigation
    bar.

  - Click View plan.

  The [Support](https://cloud.mongodb.com/go?l=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.mongodb.com%2Fv2%23%2Forg%2F%3Corganization%3E%2Fsupport) page
  displays.You can see all available support plans and a breakdown of the
features and cost for each plan.You get a 30 day free trial of the Developer plan. After your 30 day
free trial, you are automatically enrolled in Developer Support at
the estimated cost.To subscribe to the Developer plan:* Click Start 30 Day Free Trial under that
  section.

* Review Billing Address.

  If you want to enter a new billing address:

  - Clear Use saved billing address.

  - Enter a new billing address. To learn more, see [Set Payment Method](atlas-payment-method).

  You must update payment method also.

* Review Payment Method and make any necessary
  changes by clicking Edit. If you edit the
  billing address, you must update payment method also.

* Review Cart and make any necessary changes
  by clicking Edit.To subscribe to the Pro plan:* Click Select Plan under that section.

* Review Billing Address and make any
  necessary changes by clicking Edit. If you
  edit the billing address, you must update payment method
  also.

* Review Payment Method and make any necessary
  changes by clicking Edit. If you edit the
  billing address, you must update payment method also.

* Review Cart and make any necessary changes
  by clicking Edit.If you cancel a Developer or self-serve Pro support plan and
later reactivate paid support, billing
charges apply retroactively from the
date that a non-Basic support plan was last active (up to 90
days in the past) unless:* You cancel Developer support and activate self-serve Pro.

* You cancel self-serve Pro support and activate Pro support that
  is tied to a subscription.To subscribe to the Enterprise support plan, to pay with an
alternative payment method, or for additional information about
support plans, [contact MongoDB](https://www.mongodb.com/contact/atlas).
